content: Database for cloud SaaS Next.js 2025: Neon (serverless Postgres) is the emerging standard — instant branching, scale-to-zero, @neondatabase/serverless v1.1.0 for edge/serverless, PgBouncer pooling built-in. Supabase is batteries-included BaaS (Postgres + Auth + Storage + Realtime + RLS + APIs) — best when you want the full platform. PlanetScale is MySQL (Vitess), strong performance but not Postgres. For this project: Neon + Drizzle ORM is the lean stack (edge-native, TypeScript-first, smaller bundle); Supabase is valid if wanting the full BaaS. PlanetScale not recommended — MySQL incompatible with ecosystem assumptions.
